text:
Long Lost Delivery (失し物宅配便) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

|bgcolor="D6E3FF"|

|bgcolor="DAFDDA" align=center|Long Lost Delivery
|align=center|失し物宅配便 
なくしものたくはいびん 
(Najushi Mono Takuwaibin)
|bgcolor="DAFDDA" align=center|(Courier of Deleted)

|align=center colspan="3"|#060
|
|-
!
|align=center colspan="3"|Rank: B 
Transformation: 30
|
|-
!Card Effect:
|align=center colspan="3"|Call the number and describe the item you lost, and it will be delivered to you the next day. It must be lost for longer than a month.
|
|-

|align=center colspan="3"|(unknown)
|
|}

Summary

Long Lost Delivery (失し物宅配便): This card allows the caster to gain back an item that was lost or never delivered. To use this card, call the number provided and describe the item you lost. The next day, the item will be delivered to you. This only works for items that have been lost or undelivered for more than one month.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.060 :: 失し物宅配便 
専用ダイヤルに電話して、なくした物の説明をすれば次の日にはそれを届けてくれる。なくしてから１か月以上経った物でないと、受け付けてもらえない。
|-
![Eng]
|No.060 :: Long Lost Delivery 
Your item can be delivered the next day if you dial the number, and describe your lost item. If item is lost or undelivered for less than one month, it's not accepted.
|}
